title: No more Spire
description: Block all message containing "Spire" on the server Origin Realms to get a clean chat
body:
# No More Spire Mod
This mod aims to make the chat on the server Origin Realms great again by removing all messages talking about spire.

You can see messages which were removed in the MC log

## Installation / Requirement
This mod require the [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to work, and that's it just put it in your mods folder and it should work.

Contact me if you have any issue :D

## Contact me
You can contact me by discord : @ayabusa_
